📅🎉💬👤

Sound Familiar?

Parents everywhere are drowning in the chaos of coordinating their kids social lives.

📱

The Group Chat Nightmare

Texting 15 parents to find one playdate slot. Endless “How about Tuesday?” “No, Tuesday doesn't work.” back-and-forth.

😰

The Missed Party

That Evite invitation went to your spam folder. Your kid missed their friend's birthday party and you feel terrible.

😤

The Co-Parent Confusion

Your ex accepted a playdate you knew nothing about. You show up to pick up your kid and they're not there.

Features

Everything You Need for Family Scheduling

No more juggling apps, calendars, and group texts. Play-Cal brings it all together.

📅

Availability-Based Booking

Set your child's available windows once. Other parents see when you're free and request playdates in one tap.

🎉

Party Invitation Sync

Forward Evite and Paperless Post emails to Play-Cal. We extract details, set reminders, and alert you before RSVP deadlines.

👨‍👩‍👧

Co-Parent Sync

Share schedules and invitations with your co-parent, spouse, or caregivers. Everyone sees the same calendar.

💬

In-App Messaging

Quick parent-to-parent coordination without giving out your phone number. 'Running 10 minutes late' made easy.

How It Works

Schedule a Playdate in 3 Taps

1

Set Availability

Tell us when your child is free for playdates. Set recurring schedules like 'Weekdays 3-6pm' or one-off availability.

2

Connect with Parents

Invite parents you know and trust. They can see your child's availability and request playdates.

3

Approve & Schedule

Get playdate requests, approve with one tap, and it automatically goes on your calendar. Everyone gets notified.

Never Miss a Party

Party Invitation Tracking

Evite and Paperless Post invitations get lost in email chaos. Forward them to Play-Cal and we'll:

  • ✓Extract all the details — date, time, location, RSVP deadline
  • ✓Set smart reminders — alert you 7 days and 1 day before deadlines
  • ✓Share with your co-parent — they see it too, no more 'Did you RSVP?'
  • ✓Track your response — know at a glance which parties you're attending
Get Party Tracking
From: invitations@evite.com
Subject: You're Invited! Lucas's 7th Birthday

🎂 You're invited to Lucas's 7th Birthday Party!

When: Saturday, March 15th at 2:00 PM

Where: Jump Zone, 123 Main Street

RSVP by: March 8th

→ Forward to your-playcal@play-cal.com
↓
🎉Party Tracked!

Lucas's 7th Birthday

Sat, Mar 15 • 2:00 PM

Jump Zone • RSVP by Mar 8

Loved by Parents Everywhere

"

Play-Cal is a game-changer. I used to spend hours every week in text threads trying to set up one playdate. Now it takes me 30 seconds. I can't imagine my life without it.

S

Sarah K.

Mom of Two

"

As a co-parent, this app has been a lifesaver. We can both see and manage our son's social schedule without constant check-ins. The party invitation sync is genius.

M

Michael B.

Dad of One

"

I love that I can set my daughter's availability and just let my friends pick a time. It removes all the social awkwardness and pressure of scheduling. Highly recommend!

E

Emily R.

Mom of Three
